name: Lumino
title: Lumino - free Bootstrap 4.0 theme
description: Single-page Bootstrap 4 theme with transparent-to-dark fixed navbar featuring 5 links (Intro, News, Gallery, Contact, Columns page link). Fullscreen intro section with fixed background image, centered logo image, 'Lumino' site name, subtitle, and 'Begin' anchor link. News section on gray background displays 3 alternating news items, each with a 600x300 image on one side and text content (heading, description, Preview/Detail/Read button) on the other, with alternating image-left/image-right layout. Gallery section with centered heading, description, and a 12-image grid (4x3 on desktop) using Magnific Popup lightbox for fullscreen viewing. Contact section on gray background with 2-column layout: left has contact form (name, email, subject, message, Submit button) and right has contact info text with phone and email links. Light footer with copyright text.

typography.style: Ultra-light Open Sans for an airy, modern feel with generous font size

layoutDetails: Fixed navbar transitions from transparent to solid dark on scroll. Fullscreen hero with fixed background (100% width, 750px height). Max-width containers (1200px and 1230px). Alternating news items use flexbox order for layout variation. 4-column image grid with Magnific Popup. Responsive at 1800px, 1199px, 991px, 767px, 640px.
visualStyle: Clean and airy modern aesthetic with light blue accents and ultra-thin typography. Fixed background hero creates depth. Alternating news layout adds visual rhythm. Lightbox gallery for immersive image viewing.

name: Ocean
title: Ocean Bootstrap 4.0 simple theme
description: Bootstrap 4 simple theme with soft blue (#81b4eb) color scheme. Hero section with large heading 'Big Ocean' and introductory text. Multiple 2-column image-text sections alternating image position (left/right) with headings and descriptive paragraphs. Carousel section with sliding content. About section with company description. Contact section with form (name, email, subject, message) and 'Keep in touch' heading. 2 images used with CSS-styled content blocks. Open Sans font at light (300) and regular (400) weights. Responsive design with 8 breakpoints from 480px to 1900px for wide screen support.
layoutDetails: Bootstrap 4 grid layout. Alternating 2-column image-text sections. Carousel component. Contact form. Wide responsive support with 8 breakpoints up to 1900px.
visualStyle: Soft, calming blue color scheme with gentle gradients. Clean, simple layout with alternating content blocks. Approachable and professional.

name: Sided
title: Sided Bootstrap 4 Theme
description: Unique split-screen layout template with a fixed left sidebar panel and scrollable right content area. The left panel contains the site logo/branding, navigation menu, and social media links on a colored background. The right side scrolls through full-width content sections. Sections include a hero/welcome area, About section with descriptive text, Services with feature descriptions, Portfolio with image grid, and Contact section with a form. The sidebar remains fixed while content scrolls on the right. Clean modern design with a distinctive two-panel asymmetric layout. Font Awesome icons for social links. Bootstrap grid for the content area with responsive behavior that stacks the sidebar on top for mobile.

typography.style: Open Sans with clean hierarchy, professional and readable

layoutDetails: Fixed left sidebar (25-30% width) with branding and navigation. Right content area (70-75%) scrolls independently. Sidebar stacks on top for mobile.
visualStyle: Modern split-screen with dark fixed sidebar and white scrollable content. Clean asymmetric layout with professional typography and minimal decoration.

name: Story
title: The Story - Free Bootstrap Theme
description: Unique split-layout single-page template with a left panel containing the site title and a 2x2 grid of square navigation tiles (About, Gallery, Services, Contact), and a right panel displaying content sections. Background images change dynamically based on the active section using jQuery Backstretch. Navigation tiles are white boxes with centered text. Content sections appear on the right with black header bars and white content areas. Gallery section features a FlexSlider with thumbnail carousel. Contact section includes a form. Preloader on page load. Dark overall aesthetic.

typography.style: Light Open Sans with larger body text for readability on dark backgrounds

layoutDetails: Split layout: left panel (5 cols) with logo + 2x2 nav grid, right panel (7 cols) with content. Background images swap per section via Backstretch.
visualStyle: Dark, moody, artistic. Full-bleed background images with white content panels overlaid. Black header bars for section titles. White navigation tiles.

name: Godocs
title: GoDocs documentation theme
description: Documentation theme with light theme and red/pink accent. Clean navigation with logo and links (Home, Inner Page, Search Page). Hero section with large heading ('Documentation Theme By Themefisher Team') and search bar. Browse Topics section with 6 topic cards in masonry grid, each with icon, title, and list of documentation links. FAQ section ('Mostly Asked Questions') with accordion-style expandable items. Contact prompt section with CTA button. Footer with copyright. Clean, minimal documentation-focused design with clear hierarchy and readable typography.
layoutDetails: Bootstrap container, centered content, masonry topic card grid, accordion FAQ, responsive at 991px/575px
visualStyle: Clean documentation theme with red/pink accents, topic cards, FAQ accordion, and search-focused layout
